metadata.title: FormHandler — Simplify B2B Lead Generation
metadata.description: Collect inquiries and form submissions from your website visitors effortlessly. Two powerful services for B2B sellers to acquire customers faster.

hero.headline: Simplify B2B Lead Generation
hero.subheadline: Collect inquiries and form submissions from your website visitors — effortlessly. Two powerful tools designed for B2B sellers who want more customers, less hassle.

services.sectionTitle: Two Services, One Goal: More Customers

form.title: Form Endpoints
form.description: Create form submission endpoints in seconds. Paste a URL into your website's HTML form and start collecting customer data instantly.
benefits: Create unlimited form endpoints with unique URLs
Receive instant Telegram notifications on new submissions
View and manage all submissions in a clean dashboard

widget.title: Inquiry Widget
widget.description: A lightweight, embeddable chat widget that guides your website visitors through structured B2B trade inquiries — step by step.
benefits: Embed on any website with a single script tag
Built-in visitor analytics and country detection

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Send us a message — this form is powered by FormHandler.
contact.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Failed to send. Please try again.
